subject: Fw: Catherine Derby
body:
Not sure why she has done this as she is still on payroll - obviously as she is till on payroll she can't claim unemployment..she has not replied to any of my e mails or calls

G

PS My e mail has changed to gmax1@ellmax.com - plse make a note

----- Original Message -----
From: Rich Kahn <rkahn@nysgmail.com>
To: Gmax
Sent: Tue Sep 18 13:38:53 2007
Subject: re: Catherine Derby

We received paperwork today from NYS Unemployment Insurance stating that she maid a claim on 9/10/07.  She stated NES LLC was her employer and that she worked in a private home.

 

NYS is asking us to verify this information along with reason for separation (voluntarily quit, fired)

 

Please advise

 

Rich Kahn
